movie.actors: Angelina Jolie, Ethan Hawke, Kiefer Sutherland, Gena Rowlands
movie.plot: An FBI profiler is called in by French Canadian police to catch a serial killer who takes on the identity of each new victim.
movie.title: Taking Lives
movie.writer: Michael Pye (novel), Jon Bokenkamp (screen story), Jon Bokenkamp (screenplay)
